allow: Bash(git -c user.name=Claude -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'Add 2048 game webapp and blog landing page *)
PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { $g.Source } else { "gh not found" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5599/index.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host \("STATUS " + $r.StatusCode + " LEN " + $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Host \("ERR " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5599 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "cleared")
